name: Foo Yung Hai
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Crab meat (or cooked chicken or shrimp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred crab meat or chicken (if using).
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a pan and fry the shredded onion and bamboo shoots for 1 minute.
3. Beat the eggs, then add the onion, bamboo shoots, bean sprouts, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 2 tablespoons water, and crab to the pan.
4. Heat another tablespoon of oil in the pan, then add chicken stock, pinch of salt, sugar, soy sauce, ketchup, and cornstarch. Mix well and bring to a boil.
5. Keep the mixture hot while making the omelette.
6. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in an omelette pan, stir in the egg mixture, and cook.
7. Serve on a hot dish and pour the sauce over it.
